step_rationale: Omega-3 PUFA with cardioprotective and anti-inflammatory effects independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Omega-3 polyunsaturated fatty acid that promotes cardiac recovery and reduces systemic inflammation after myocardial infarction.

references.title: Differential modulation of polyunsaturated fatty acids in patients with myocardial infarction treated with ticagrelor or clopidogrel.
